title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS equips AI coding agents with up-to-date documentation, best practices, and tested procedures to interact with AWS services more effectively. The toolkit enables agents to deploy infrastructure like Lambda and API Gateway with reduced errors and improved success rates.
